name: Cauliflower with Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Prepared Mustard (preferably Dijon or Dusseldorf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the stem and leaves from the cauliflower.
2. Steam the cauliflower whole until it is barely tender. Drain and keep warm.
3. Whip the cream and set aside briefly.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the mayonnaise, salt, mustard, and lemon juice. Whisk until blended; fold in the whipped cream.
5. Pour the sauce over the cauliflower or serve it separately. Sprinkle with paprika.
